overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through an industrial urban district. The player walks along sidewalks and crosses streets near a large circular stadium, then approaches and looks up at a distinctive yellow and black megabuilding with red 'NO ENTRY' signage. The scene features pedestrians, sparse vehicle traffic, and industrial architecture with overhead pipes and power lines.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial city sidewalk with stadium view

events.description: approaching intersection crosswalk with traffic light visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk toward the intersection, passing pedestrians and industrial structures

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with purple hair and white jacket walking toward the camera
pedestrian in red pants standing near the crosswalk waiting to cross

entered.detail: large circular megastructure with glass facade dominating the background
large orange industrial pipes running along the right side of the street
green street sign with white text reading 'Brandon' mounted on concrete
tall traffic light pole with signals and pedestrian crossing lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a first-person view walking along an industrial city sidewalk. The large circular stadium looms ahead in the distance while orange industrial pipes run overhead on the right. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions, including one with distinctive purple hair approaching the camera. The player approaches a crosswalk with a traffic light pole visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with industrial buildings and power infrastructure

events.description: white van drives through the intersection from left to right
moving from the stadium view toward the distinctive yellow and black megabuilding

agents.ego_description: crossing the street intersection while navigating around vehicles and other pedestrians, turning slightly toward the yellow tower

notable_agents.action: white van driving through the intersection, passing in front of the player

entered.detail: tall distinctive building with yellow and black diagonal stripes and red neon signage
white utility van driving through the intersection
large metal electrical transmission tower with multiple power lines

segments.scene_description: The player crosses the asphalt intersection, moving away from the stadium view. A white van drives past as the camera turns toward a distinctive yellow and black striped megabuilding. Power line towers become visible on the left, and the industrial pipes recede into the background. The scene transitions from the stadium approach to focusing on the yellow tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street looking up at megabuilding with overhead bridge

events.description: camera tilts upward dramatically to view the full height of the yellow megabuilding
sun creates lens flare as camera looks up toward the top of the building against the sky

agents.ego_description: walking slowly while tilting the camera upward to admire the towering yellow building, passing under a metal footbridge

entered.detail: metal truss footbridge crossing overhead in the foreground
tall orange and white industrial smokestacks emitting white smoke
red neon signage reading 'NO ENTRY' wrapping around the yellow building

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the imposing height of the yellow and black megabuilding, with red 'NO ENTRY' neon lights visible on its facade. The player walks under a metal footbridge as the perspective shifts to look straight up the building's length. Power lines frame the left side of the shot, while industrial chimneys emit smoke on the right. The sun creates a lens flare as the camera gazes up at the tower against the blue sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through an industrial urban district that shifts from a wide street view toward the towering height of a megabuilding. It begins with a walk along a city sidewalk beneath orange industrial pipes, passing pedestrians and moving toward a distant circular stadium. As the camera crosses an asphalt intersection and a white van drives past, the perspective turns away from the stadium to focus on a distinctive yellow and black striped tower. The scene then shifts as the player walks under a metal footbridge, with the camera tilting upward to reveal the imposing length of the building and its red neon NO ENTRY signs. Finally, the view gazes straight up the facade against a blue sky, framed by power lines and smoking chimneys as the sun creates a bright lens flare.
